title: The Downfall of Osen
actors: Isuzu Yamada, Daijirô Natsukawa, Mitsusaburô Ramon
plot: In Tokyo, Osen is the servant girl of an unscrupulous antiques dealer, Kumazawa, who takes in the penniless Sokichi Hata. Kumazawa mistreats Sokichi and Osen, while swindling some Buddhist monks out of their temple treasures. When...
